description.p: Update the Flatpak runtime to GNOME 50 and pin release workflow actions to immutable commits.
Show the player window again when media becomes available without triggering an application-ready notification.
Add an optional album artwork color tint for the player window.
Make the status indicator show and hide actions reliable across Wayland and X11.
Prevent status indicator menu actions from being activated twice.
Add compact mode to the status indicator menu.
Add an optional native status indicator when the desktop supports StatusNotifierItem.
Add a status indicator menu with show, hide, settings, about, and quit actions.
Add a preference to disable the status indicator and show when the desktop does not support it.
Reuse the About dialog on repeated activations without constraining it to the mini-player window.
Add a header-bar About button and improve About dialog sizing.
Document the build-tree run command with Meson's development environment.
Add release packaging, icon integration, and validator-clean AppStream metadata.
Add background operation, automatic window visibility, preferences, and start-on-login support.
